column7: Practical tips: station name, booking advice
G-trains from Beijing South. Book on 12306 app. ~553 CNY 2nd class.
PEK/PKX to PVG/SHA. 2h flight + transit time. 500-1500 CNY.
G-trains from Beijing West. ~515 CNY 2nd class.
From Shanghai Hongqiao. 6 hours. ~670 CNY 2nd class.
PVG to XIY. 2.5h flight. Often cheaper than train.
Xi'an North to Chongqing West/North. About 5h. ~260 CNY 2nd class.
CKG to PVG/SHA. 2.5h flight. Often 400-900 CNY.
About 8 hours. Flight recommended for this route.
